metadata.description: Optional. Blob Container Name. Must start with a letter. Can only contain lower case letters, numbers, and -.

Optional. Custom workload identifier to use when naming the resource group and resources. If not specified then "image-management" will be used. All resources will be created using the Cloud Adoption Framework naming convention.
Optional. Reverse the normal Cloud Adoption Framework naming convention by putting the resource type abbreviation at the end of the resource name.
Optional. Resource Id of an existing Log Analytics Workspace to which diagnostic logs will be sent.
Optional. Remote Location to which an Image Gallery will be deployed to support regional disaster recovery.
Optional. Storage Account Sku Name.

Conditional. Required if the Storage Account kind is set to BlobStorage. The access tier is used for billing. The "Premium" access tier is the default value for premium block blobs storage account type and it cannot be changed for the premium block blobs storage account type.

Optional. Indicates whether the storage account permits requests to be authorized with the account access key via Shared Key. If false, then all requests, including shared access signatures, must be authorized with Azure Active Directory (Azure AD). The default value is null, which is equivalent to true.
Optional. The Resource Id of the Private DNS Zone where the Private Endpoint (if configured) A record will be registered.
Optional. Whether or not public network access is allowed for this resource. To limit public network access, use the "PermittedIPs" and/or the "ServiceEndpointSubnetResourceIds" parameters.
Optional. The ResourceId of the private endpoint subnet.
Optional. Array of permitted IPs or IP CIDR blocks that can access the storage account using the Public Endpoint.
Optional. An array of subnet resource IDs where Service Endpoints will be created to allow access to the storage account through the public endpoint.
Optional. The tags by resource type to apply to the resources created by this template.
DO NOT MODIFY THIS VALUE! The timestamp is needed to differentiate deployments for certain Azure resources and must be set using a parameter.

variables.nameConv_ImageManagement_ResGroup: [if(parameters('nameConvResTypeAtEnd'), format('avd-{0}-{1}', variables('identifier'), variables('nameConvSuffix')), format('RESOURCETYPE-avd-{0}-{1}', variables('identifier'), variables('nameConvSuffix')))]
variables.nameConv_ImageManagement_Resources: [if(parameters('nameConvResTypeAtEnd'), format('avd-{0}-{1}', variables('identifier'), variables('nameConvSuffix')), format('RESOURCETYPE-avd-{0}-{1}', variables('identifier'), variables('nameConvSuffix')))]

metadata.description: Required. Name of the Azure Compute Gallery.
Optional. Location for all resources.
Optional. Tags to apply to the gallery.
Optional. Description of the Azure Compute Gallery.

parameters.networkAcls: [if(or(not(empty(variables('ipRules'))), not(empty(parameters('storageServiceEndpointSubnetResourceIds')))), createObject('value', createObject('bypass', 'AzureServices', 'defaultAction', 'Deny', 'virtualNetworkRules', variables('virtualNetworkRules'), 'ipRules', variables('ipRules'))), createObject('value', createObject('bypass', 'AzureServices', 'defaultAction', 'Deny')))]

metadata.description: Category group name, e.g. "allLogs". Use either categoryGroup or category, not both.
Individual log category name. Use either categoryGroup or category, not both.
Optional. Override name for the diagnostic setting resource. If omitted, a deterministic name is generated from the workspace ID.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace to send logs to.
Resource ID of the storage account to archive logs to.
Resource ID of the Event Hub authorization rule.
Name of the Event Hub. If omitted, a hub is created for each log category.
Log categories to stream. Defaults to allLogs when omitted.
Services allowed to bypass network rules. Comma-separated: AzureServices, Logging, Metrics, None.
Default action when no rule matches.
SKU/replication type.
Optional. Scope restriction for copy operations.
Optional. SAS expiration period in format d.hh:mm:ss. Empty to disable.
Optional. Azure Files identity-based authentication settings object.
Optional. Key Vault URI for customer-managed key encryption.
Optional. Key Vault key name for customer-managed encryption.
Optional. Resource ID of user-assigned identity with key vault access for CMK.

properties.encryption: [if(variables('useCmk'), createObject('keySource', 'Microsoft.Keyvault', 'requireInfrastructureEncryption', parameters('requireInfrastructureEncryption'), 'keyvaultproperties', createObject('keyvaulturi', parameters('encryptionKeyVaultUri'), 'keyname', parameters('encryptionKeyName')), 'identity', if(not(empty(parameters('encryptionUserAssignedIdentityResourceId'))), createObject('userAssignedIdentity', parameters('encryptionUserAssignedIdentityResourceId')), null()), 'services', createObject('blob', createObject('enabled', true(), 'keyType', 'Account'), 'file', createObject('enabled', true(), 'keyType', 'Account'), 'queue', createObject('enabled', true(), 'keyType', 'Account'), 'table', createObject('enabled', true(), 'keyType', 'Account'))), createObject('keySource', 'Microsoft.Storage', 'requireInfrastructureEncryption', parameters('requireInfrastructureEncryption'), 'services', createObject('blob', createObject('enabled', true(), 'keyType', 'Account'), 'file', createObject('enabled', true(), 'keyType', 'Account'), 'queue', createObject('enabled', true(), 'keyType', 'Account'), 'table', createObject('enabled', true(), 'keyType', 'Account'))))]

Optional. Override name for the diagnostic setting resource. If omitted, a deterministic name is generated from the workspace ID.

Resource ID of the storage account to archive logs to.

Resource ID of the subnet to deploy the private endpoint into.
Resource ID of the resource to create the private endpoint for.
Group ID (sub-resource) of the private link service.

Optional. Private DNS zone group: resource IDs of private DNS zones to register this endpoint in.

Object (principal) ID of the identity receiving the role.
Type of the assigned principal. Defaults to ServicePrincipal.
Optional human-readable description for the assignment.
A single role assignment to apply to a specific resource.
Role assignments to apply to this storage account.
